title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. multiramum
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. multiramum is a subspecies of the Hieracium ctenodon plant, commonly known as a type of hawkweed. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, and it has also been used to treat wounds and promote tissue repair. In herbal preparations, Hieracium ctenodon subsp. multiramum is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
